features.name: App module
features.notes: GPU config parsing, App struct. Complete.

features.name: Auth token manager
features.notes: Token management and caching. Complete.

features.name: Client module
features.notes: gRPC client wrapper. Complete.

features.name: Cloud bucket mount
features.notes: Mount params and builder patterns. Complete.

features.name: Cls module
features.notes: Class/Callable support with batching. Complete.

features.name: Config module
features.notes: Profile parsing and config management. Complete.

features.name: Error types
features.notes: Error enum with thiserror. Complete.

features.name: Ephemeral module
features.notes: Shared start_ephemeral_heartbeat() with 3 tests. Used by volume.rs and queue.rs. Complete.

features.name: Function module
features.notes: FromName, Remote, Spawn, stats, autoscaler. 4 input-plane stubs remain (attempt_start/await/retry, blob_get).

features.name: Function call module
features.notes: Call result retrieval and cancel. Complete.

features.name: Image module with Build()
features.notes: Layer-by-layer build orchestration, streaming polling, registry support, delete. Complete.

features.name: Invocation module
features.notes: Control-plane and input-plane invocation, CBOR serialization. Complete.

features.name: Logger module
features.notes: slog-based logging. Complete.

features.name: Proxy module
features.notes: Proxy from name. Complete.

features.name: Queue module
features.notes: Queue operations with partitions, Get/GetMany/Put/PutMany/Iterate with pickle serialization. Complete.

features.name: Retries module
features.notes: Exponential backoff retry logic. Complete.

features.name: Sandbox module
features.notes: All service methods done. ContainerProcess type with stdin (Write), stdout/stderr (Read), lazy stream readers, offset-based stdin, wait(). Complete.

features.name: Sandbox filesystem module
features.notes: File I/O operations, dir listing, file watch. Complete.

features.name: Secret module
features.notes: Secret creation and management. Complete.

features.name: Serialization module
features.notes: CBOR/JSON serialization. Complete.

features.name: Task command router
features.notes: Full TaskCommandRouterClient struct with JWT auth management, auth retry, all methods (MountDirectory, SnapshotDirectory, ExecStart, ExecStdinWrite, ExecWait, ExecStdioRead), ContainerProcessClient trait impl. 26 tests. Complete.

features.name: Volume module
features.notes: Volume operations with ephemeral heartbeat. Complete.

features.name: Integration tests
features.notes: 174 integration tests across 21 test files. Mock-based tests exercising public API. Complete.

features.name: Rust examples
features.notes: 26 Rust examples in modal/examples/ mirroring all Go examples. All compile successfully. Complete.

features.name: Missing Go test file equivalents
features.notes: 38 new integration tests across 6 files: app_test, config_test, logger_test, cloud_bucket_mount_test, serialization_test, task_command_router_test. Also fixed queue_test mock. Complete.

features.name: Crate-level documentation and cleanup
features.notes: Added crate-level //! documentation to lib.rs matching doc.go content. Fixed unused import warnings in function.rs and invocation.rs. Fixed unreachable code warning in function.rs create_input. Complete.

features.name: Remove unimplemented!() stubs from test mocks
features.notes: Replaced 4 unimplemented!() stubs in function.rs MockInvocationClient with proper response-queue mock implementations (attempt_start, attempt_await, attempt_retry, blob_get). Complete.

features.name: Client service accessors and missing service traits
features.notes: Added AppService, ClsService, CloudBucketMountService traits. Rewrote Client struct with 11 service accessors (Box<dyn Trait>) matching Go SDK. Added ClientBuilder for construction. 12 new tests. Complete.

features.name: SecretService from_name and delete methods
features.notes: Added SecretGrpcClient trait, SecretServiceImpl with from_name/from_map/delete. NotFound error mapping, allow_missing support for delete. 11 new unit tests, 5 new integration tests. Complete.

features.name: Profile config resolution and ClientParams
features.notes: Added Profile::from_config() and from_config_with_overrides() matching Go NewClient/NewClientWithOptions config resolution. Moved ClientParams to config module. Eliminated all dead-code warnings from config.rs. 5 new tests. Complete.

features.name: gRPC transport layer
features.notes: Real gRPC transport layer connecting SDK to Modal API. ModalGrpcTransport struct wrapping tonic ModalClientClient<Channel> with TLS support. All 13 *GrpcClient trait implementations. Arc delegation for shared transport. Client::connect() and connect_with_options() constructors wiring all 11 services. 7 unit tests. Complete.
